text:
The Israeli military has no goal of “overthrowing” the government in Iran, Brig. Gen. Effie Defrin, a spokesman for the Israeli military, said in a news briefing on Sunday. His statement echoed comments from Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, who said on Thursday that the collapse of Iran’s autocratic government ultimately depended on the Iranian people.
Ali Bani Odeh’s wife and four young boys hadn’t seen him in a month and a half when he came home to Tammun, in the West Bank, from his construction job in Israel late on Friday to spend the last few days of Ramadan with his family.
On Saturday night, the boys persuaded him to take them out for a drive. Eid al-Fitr, the end of Ramadan, was coming, so there were new clothes to buy. The day’s fast had been broken, so there were sweets to be had, too.
title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.

citability.title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.
